prompt: How should `cube pr push` determine which PR/branch to advance in v1?
choices: Infer from @'s ancestry (nearest pr/<n> bookmark), with --pr/--branch as explicit override
Require an explicit --pr <n> in v1; no inference

prompt: Defer any force-push capability (e.g. a guarded --force-with-lease on `cube pr push`) entirely to a later version, keeping v1 strictly fast-forward-only?
What should `cube workspace lease --resume_pr <n>` do when PR N is already MERGED or CLOSED?
choices: Warn and proceed (positioning is still useful for inspection)
Hard error (refuse to resume a non-open PR)

prompt: Include T5 (GC of pr/* bookmarks for closed PRs) in the cube v1 scope, rather than deferring it as optional hygiene?
